response.global_analysis: Subtitle generation for part_005.mov, covering the songs 'Iinazukkyun' (Nakiri Ayame & Usada Pekora) and 'Maware! Setsugetsuka' (Nakiri Ayame, Shirakami Fubuki, & Ookami Mio). The Reference JSON for 'Iinazukkyun' was incomplete, so I relied heavily on on-screen text and audio tokens to ensure precision. For 'Maware! Setsugetsuka', the Reference JSON provided the main chorus and some verses, which I aligned with the audio and visual cues. Timestamps are precisely matched to vocal starts and ends, ensuring no overlaps between consecutive lines and reflecting the fast-paced nature of the songs.

subtitles.original: 避けてても結局見えないあいつの胸の内
subtitles.english: Even if I avoid it, I still can't see into his heart

subtitles.original: おじゃまの背伸びも気取りもいらないかな
subtitles.english: I don't need pesky showing off or acting cool

subtitles.original: 先輩後輩ヤンキージャンキー関係ない
subtitles.english: Senior, junior, yankee, junkie—it doesn't matter

subtitles.original: いざ尋常に勝負
subtitles.english: Now, let's have a fair fight

subtitles.original: 君ともしもその気なら
subtitles.english: If you're up for it

subtitles.original: Bon meat-za 始まりそうならさ
subtitles.english: If it feels like 'Bon meat-za' is starting...

subtitles.original: また犬技繰り出す
subtitles.english: Unleashing those dog tricks again

subtitles.original: 僕で
subtitles.english: If it's me...

subtitles.original: いれば so sweet だな
subtitles.english: it'll be so sweet

subtitles.original: あれな どこか同じだね
subtitles.english: That part's the same somewhere, right?

subtitles.original: へちゃむくれな修羅場
subtitles.english: A messy, chaotic scene

subtitles.original: 派手なドラが鳴るよ
subtitles.english: A flashy gong will ring out

subtitles.original: 意味深な like you 曖昧な愛より三球
subtitles.english: A meaningful 'like you', better than vague love, thank you

subtitles.original: しのぎも言わず愛してちょうだい
subtitles.english: Give me your love without hesitation

subtitles.original: まじ一世一代 血ブーなのだ
subtitles.english: Wait, once in a lifetime, it's a 'blood boo'!

subtitles.original: 自分の意思はどんなもんじゃい
subtitles.english: How strong is your own will?

subtitles.original: い・い・い・許婚っきゅん I love you なのだ
subtitles.english: E-e-e-Iinazukkyun, I love you indeed!

subtitles.original: 四六時中愛をちょうだい
subtitles.english: Give me love 24/7

subtitles.original: さて?
subtitles.english: Well?

subtitles.original: い・い・一か八ッキュン I・哀・逢・愛
subtitles.english: E-e-It-all-or-nothing-kyun, I-sorrow-meeting-love

subtitles.original: 罠ろっきゅー 1/2がもうたまんない
subtitles.english: Trap rock-you, 1/2 is already unbearable

subtitles.original: これなんて試練 会いたいかも知れん
subtitles.english: Is this a trial? I might want to see you

subtitles.original: 毎晩必勝 先輩タリナイア
subtitles.english: Winning every night, I need more of you, Senpai

subtitles.original: 前代未聞
subtitles.english: Unprecedented,

subtitles.original: 天真爛漫
subtitles.english: innocent and carefree,

subtitles.original: 変幻無双
subtitles.english: matchless transformation,

subtitles.original: 明鏡止水
subtitles.english: clear and serene mind.

subtitles.original: せーの
subtitles.english: One, two...

subtitles.original: いち に さん はい
subtitles.english: One, two, three, go!

subtitles.original: ハッハッハッハッハッハッハッハイヤー
subtitles.english: Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha-yah!

subtitles.original: さあさあさあ これよりご覧いただけますのは 私たちの栄枯盛衰
subtitles.english: Come one, come all! What you're about to see is our ups and downs

subtitles.original: 時代は常に日進月歩 聞いてて老若男女
subtitles.english: The times are always moving forward; listen up, young and old

subtitles.original: 一見は勧善懲悪 悪者どもを一刀両断
subtitles.english: At first glance it's rewarding good and punishing evil, cutting down the villains

subtitles.original: 「でもホントにそれだけでいいの?」 楽しもう 妄想繚乱
subtitles.english: "But is that really enough?" Let's enjoy the wild delusions!

subtitles.original: もうなんだってこんにゃく問答
subtitles.english: Everything's just a nonsensical debate now

subtitles.original: ハッハッハッハッハッハッハッハイヤー
subtitles.english: Ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha, ha-yah!

subtitles.original: よーぽん!
subtitles.english: Yo, pon!

subtitles.original: どこからともなく現れて すぐにどこかへ行っちゃって
subtitles.english: Appearing out of nowhere, and vanishing just as fast

subtitles.original: 神出鬼没 チャンスを待ったら一進一退
subtitles.english: Elusive and fleeting; wait for a chance, and it's a back-and-forth

subtitles.original: 追いかければ東奔西走
subtitles.english: If you chase it, you'll be running all over the place

subtitles.original: 時代はつねに千変万化 人の心は複雑怪奇
subtitles.english: The times are always changing, and human hearts are strange and complex

subtitles.original: 「でも本気でそんなこと言ってんの?」
subtitles.english: "But are you really serious about that?"

subtitles.original: もうどうにも満身創痍
subtitles.english: I'm already covered in wounds

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 巡り巡って夜の町
subtitles.english: Ah, around and around the night town...

subtitles.english: Ah, around and around the night town...

subtitles.english: You give the signal and start to dance

subtitles.original: はぁ〜
subtitles.english: Ah~

subtitles.english: Spin, spin, spin, spin, spin, spin, spin, spin, spin!
